page-stories-meta-description: Real stories from people around the world using Ethereum to send money, protect their savings, and build a more open future.
page-stories-hero-description: With over 312 million unique addresses and users in nearly every country, Ethereum is powering stories of financial freedom, creative expression, and community building.
page-stories-discover-subtitle: Real stories from Ethereum ecosystem members
page-stories-more-subtitle: Watch real people share how Ethereum fits into their lives and communities.
page-stories-community-subtitle: Voices from the Ethereum community, sharing how the network has made a difference in their lives.
page-stories-banner-title: Tell us how you use Ethereum
page-stories-banner-description: Help us showcase how Ethereum is being used across the world and join others who have already shared their story.
